item.title: Will the New Guy Get Fired?
item.description: A tense and suspenseful moment as the new team member faces challenges. Watch to see if they can rise to the occasion or risk being let go.

media:content.media:title: Will the New Guy Get Fired?
media:content.media:description: A tense and suspenseful moment as the new team member faces challenges. Watch to see if they can rise to the occasion or risk being let go.

item.title: Planter Upgrades: Time for the Torch
item.description: Watch as upgrades are made to the planter with welding and modifications. See the process, tools, and techniques used to improve farm equipment performance.

media:content.media:title: Planter Upgrades: Time for the Torch
media:content.media:description: Watch as upgrades are made to the planter with welding and modifications. See the process, tools, and techniques used to improve farm equipment performance.

item.title: First Day Adventures in the Field
item.description: Join the excitement of the first day in the field. Experience challenges, discoveries, and the start of a new adventure in farm life.

media:content.media:title: First Day Adventures in the Field
media:content.media:description: Join the excitement of the first day in the field. Experience challenges, discoveries, and the start of a new adventure in farm life.

item.title: Sold! Big Mack’s Headed Down the Road
item.description: Watch as Big Mack finds a new home and hits the road. A look at the sale, preparation, and journey of this iconic truck leaving the lot.

media:content.media:title: Sold! Big Mack’s Headed Down the Road
media:content.media:description: Watch as Big Mack finds a new home and hits the road. A look at the sale, preparation, and journey of this iconic truck leaving the lot.

item.title: Spring Preparation Underway
item.description: Watch as spring preparations begin on the farm. From equipment checks to field prep, see the work that gets everything ready for a productive season.

media:content.media:title: Spring Preparation Underway
media:content.media:description: Watch as spring preparations begin on the farm. From equipment checks to field prep, see the work that gets everything ready for a productive season.

item.title: Our Brand-New Custom Tractor Arrives
item.description: See the arrival of our brand-new custom tractor. Explore its features, setup, and first impressions as it’s put to work on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Our Brand-New Custom Tractor Arrives
media:content.media:description: See the arrival of our brand-new custom tractor. Explore its features, setup, and first impressions as it’s put to work on the farm.

item.title: The Worst Job on the Farm
item.description: A look at the toughest, messiest, or most challenging task on the farm. Watch the effort, frustration, and determination involved in tackling it.

media:content.media:title: The Worst Job on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A look at the toughest, messiest, or most challenging task on the farm. Watch the effort, frustration, and determination involved in tackling it.

item.title: Buried Alive Battling Mother Nature
item.description: Watch the struggle against extreme weather and tough conditions on the farm. See how we fight to stay productive and safe while Mother Nature pushes back.

media:content.media:title: Buried Alive Battling Mother Nature
media:content.media:description: Watch the struggle against extreme weather and tough conditions on the farm. See how we fight to stay productive and safe while Mother Nature pushes back.

item.title: Dougo Wrecks His Yard
item.description: Watch Dougo accidentally cause chaos in his yard. A mix of humor, surprises, and unexpected destruction makes this a memorable moment.

media:content.media:title: Dougo Wrecks His Yard
media:content.media:description: Watch Dougo accidentally cause chaos in his yard. A mix of humor, surprises, and unexpected destruction makes this a memorable moment.

item.title: Last 12 Rows End in Disaster
item.description: The final 12 rows of the field take a turn for the worse. Watch unexpected challenges and setbacks unfold during harvest or fieldwork.

media:content.media:title: Last 12 Rows End in Disaster
media:content.media:description: The final 12 rows of the field take a turn for the worse. Watch unexpected challenges and setbacks unfold during harvest or fieldwork.

item.title: That Was Definitely Dougo!
item.description: A moment that proves it was definitely Dougo. Watch the action and see why this moment stands out in the story.

media:content.media:title: That Was Definitely Dougo!
media:content.media:description: A moment that proves it was definitely Dougo. Watch the action and see why this moment stands out in the story.
